options.name: -area
options.description: Area in which endcaps are to be verified

options.name: -coreBoundaryOnly
options.description: Verify endcaps only at the core-boundary and not abutting obstructions

options.name: -error
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -ignore_macro
options.description: Specify which macro should be ignored

options.name: -powerDomain
options.description: Specify the power domain to check

options.name: -tripleWell
options.description: Check triple well insertion. Only check the cell lists are specified in setEndMode.

options.name: -wrongLocation
options.description: Check the cells which are not in right location also. They are not check by default.
